title: Referential integrity under load
description: Given concurrent deletes and association resolution, the system should return either a valid result or clean null/empty, never a dangling reference or crash. Spec: features/concurrency/referential_integrity_under_load.feature

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting: review referential integrity under load scenarios and add missing steps. Next: implement Python/Rust steps + tests. Blockers: none.
